description: Command authority contracts. Default rule: any command not explicitly listed below is unavailable for workflow authority. Human-readable orientation is generated/advisory only.
default_rule: All commands are unavailable for workflow authority unless explicitly listed in commands[]. Output from an uncontracted command must not affect owner selection, approval, readiness, integrity, selected execution set, artifact authority, review verdict, or learning provenance.
rules: No command may emit a review verdict.
Product mutation command authority can exist only inside beo-execute approved envelope.

reads: TICKET.md structured authority block (compact approval-bearing checks; documented markdown sections are diagnostic-only draft surfaces)
CONTEXT.md and PLAN.md structured authority blocks (full approval checks)
runtime_dependencies: BEO YAML subset enforced: objects, lists, strings, numbers, booleans, and null only; aliases and custom tags rejected

exit_codes.1: check failed (integrity issue or validation error)

commands.staleness_rule: Helper output is stale if artifact hashes have changed since last run. Stale output must not be used as current evidence.
commands.failure_handling: On registry load failure, missing runtime dependency, YAML parser import failure, strict loader setup failure, unsupported YAML feature, missing structured authority block for approval-bearing checks, or missing/invalid compact expanded projection markers: fail closed. Output integrity: unavailable or invalid, approval_envelope_complete: false, approval_envelope_status: unavailable or invalid when JSON output is possible; otherwise report setup dependency unavailable. Exit nonzero and do not use helper output as current integrity evidence.
forbidden_interpretations: Helper output does not grant approval.
Helper output does not refresh approval.
Helper output does not select execution set.
integrity.status: verified does not mean PASS_EXECUTE.

commands.failure_handling: Report setup dependency unavailable. Do not affect runtime owner, approval, readiness, execution set, review verdict, or learning provenance.
forbidden_interpretations: Version output does not create workflow authority.
Version output does not authorize br subcommands.
Version output does not start runtime delivery.

commands.failure_handling: Report setup dependency unavailable. Do not affect runtime owner, approval, readiness, execution set, review verdict, or learning provenance.
forbidden_interpretations: Version output does not create workflow authority.
Version output does not authorize bv robot flags.
Version output does not start runtime delivery.

commands.failure_handling: Report setup dependency unavailable or below minimum version. Do not affect runtime authority.

explicit_unavailable_groups: all br commands except explicitly contracted br.version
all bv commands except explicitly contracted bv.version
any command not listed in commands[]
